response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance of 'Rolling Girl' by wowaka, confirmed by on-screen text. 2. Identified the transition period between songs. 3. Identified the performance of '誰も見ていない夢を見ろ' by Ai Higuchi, confirmed by on-screen text. 4. Searched for lyrics for both songs; found 'Rolling Girl' lyrics via web search and transcribed lyrics for the second song from the video, as they were provided on-screen and the song was not found in standard databases. 5. Mapped scenes chronologically based on timestamps. 6. Adjusted end time of the final scene to fit within video duration. 7. Generated JSON.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a virtual YouTuber, Amane Kanata, performing two songs: 'Rolling Girl' and '誰も見ていない夢を見ろ' (Dare mo mite inai yume wo miro). The performance is characterized by emotive vocal delivery and expressive animation on a stage.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs 'Rolling Girl' on a stage with vibrant lighting and dynamic effects. On-screen text 'ローリンガール' identifies the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ロンリーガールはいつまでも 届かない夢見て
騒ぐ頭の中を掻き回して、掻き回して。
「問題ない。」と呟いて、言葉は失われた？
もう失敗、もう失敗。
間違い探しに終われば、また、回るの！
もう一回、もう一回。
「私は今日も転がります。」と、
少女は言う 少女は言う
言葉に意味を奏でながら！
「もう良いかい？」
「まだですよ、まだまだ先は見えないので。息を止めるの、今。」
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Lonely girl always dreamt of unreachable dreams
Making noise inside her head, stirring, churning.
She muttered, 'no problem,' but aren't those words lost?
Failing again, failing again.
After your search for mistakes, let's roll again!
Once more, once more
'I'll roll again today,'
The girl said, the girl said
Playing with the meaning of words!
'Are you alright now?'
'Not yet. I still can't see my destination.
I'll just stop breathing, now.'

scenes.description: A short transition scene with darkness and dim stage lights after the first performance.
Amane Kanata performs '誰も見ていない夢を見ろ'. On-screen text identifies the song title and credits Ai Higuchi for lyrics/music and The Charm Park for arrangement.
scenes.song_title: 誰も見ていない夢を見ろ
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
今度こそ 生き返れない そう思った ベッドの中
気づけばカーテンの隙間から
朝が正義を教えた
ああ生きてたと安堵
ああ生きてしまったと絶望
まだやれるのかな まだやらないのかな
いっそバリィも枯れてしまえば
なんてね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
This time for sure, I can't come back to life, that's what I thought in bed
If I notice, from the gap in the curtains
Morning taught me justice
Ah, I was relieved that I was alive
Ah, I despaired that I had lived
Am I still able to do it? Or am I not going to do it?
If the barrier would just wither away
Just kidding
